title: stevia tenuis
intro: Stevia tenuis is a plant species belonging to the same genus as stevia rebaudiana, and is another member of the Stevia genus within the sunflower family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of glycosides, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stevia tenuis include its potential to help manage blood sugar levels, reduce blood pressure, and provide relief from digestive issues, among others. Herbal preparations of Stevia tenuis can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
